servers.name: JARVIS MCP Server
servers.description: Core MCP tool server — exposes jarvis_get_account, jarvis_fill_rfi, jarvis_get_proposal, etc.

servers.name: OpenCode Observer
servers.description: Watches OpenCode conversations and broadcasts to JARVIS event bus (HTTP:3000, WS:3001)

servers.name: JARVIS Orchestrator
servers.description: Core orchestrator — starts all skills, event bus, worker pool

servers.name: All (start_jarvis.sh)
servers.description: Recommended: launches all services together (Observer + Orchestrator + Dashboard)
